semantic.role: Pipeline stage task responsible for aggregating source files into directory-level and project-level content units, with support for resuming interrupted aggregations.
responsibilities: Aggregate tracked source files into hierarchical content units for each directory and the project root.
Resume partially completed aggregations from a prior run by querying execution checkpoints for incomplete directory items.
Compute directory depth and process directories bottom-up to ensure child directories are aggregated before their parents.
Use concurrency-limiting to parallelize directory aggregation while respecting resource constraints.
outOfScope: Parsing CLI commands or managing user-facing arguments.
Orchestrating services unrelated to content aggregation.
Source code scanning or dependency graph construction.
Final commit-stage output generation (this task produces intermediate results only).
invariants: Aggregation is always bottom-up: deeper directories are processed before shallower ones.
Checkpoint recovery replaces full tree traversal for aggregation resumption; only incomplete items from a prior run are re-processed.
No CLI command parsing or unrelated service orchestration is performed within this module.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Implement a scalable, resumable aggregation stage for the ArchSpine pipeline, leveraging execution checkpoints to avoid redundant work and to keep the stage focused.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: Based on git log: 'chore: apply release gate fixes and sync accumulated source changes'. Likely includes bug fixes and synchronization of the aggregation module with other pipeline changes to ensure checkpoint compatibility and concurrency correctness.

publicSurface.description: Pipeline stage task class that aggregates source file content into per-directory and project-level units. Extends SpineTask and is executed by the task runtime during the 'aggregation' checkpoint stage. Provides checkpoint-based recovery for interrupted runs.
